category_sources: Official SIP documentation covers specification files, command line tools, Python API, and C API topics.
source_facts.description says it creates Python bindings for C and C++ libraries.
display_name_sources: Official documentation page title is SIP Documentation.
docs_sources: Official documentation page lists the SIP documentation contents and version.
source_facts.homepage points to the official Read the Docs documentation.
repo_sources: Official documentation and package metadata expose source distributions, but no official source-control repository URL was identified.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies Python bindings for C and C++ libraries.
source_facts.executables lists sip-build, sip-install, sip-wheel, and related CLI tools.
